reason: 新增 memory_search 必须按静态注册表流程：mcp/types.rs 加 def + native_registry 加一条 NativeToolEntry（enabled/parallel_safe/read_only/bypasses_approval/call）+ list_native_builtin_tool_defs 暴露 + 更新 EXPECTED_ORDER/read_only/bypass 等注册表测试。
工具 read_only / parallel-safe / approval-bypass 契约；memory_read 是 read_only 但有意非 parallel-safe，memory_search 元数据要与之对齐。
